title: Muthoot Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Muthoot Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Muthoot Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Muthoot Finance:
Muthoot Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Muthoot Finance!
